---
title: "ISSS608-VAA"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

# ISSS608-VAA

Hi, I’m **Jedidiah Asaf T**.\
This website contains my hands-on exercises for **ISSS608 Visual Analytics and Applications**.

## Hands-on Exercises

::: card
### Hands-on Exercise 3a

Programming Interactive Data Visualisation with R

[Open Exercise](hands_on_exercise_3a.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
:::

::: card
### Hands-on Exercise 3b

Programming Animated Statistical Graphics with R

[Open Exercise](hands_on_exercise_3b.qmd){.btn .btn-primary}
:::
